old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.9.8","title":"Bind relay signer identity in link frames","description":"Per-hop forwarding re-signs DST||payload, but the current link frame omits a signer/source identifier and verification derives a key from the preserved IPv6 source. Define an authenticated relay identity/key-selection field or equivalent deterministic lookup that supports preserved DAO origins and RFC6554 destination mutation.","acceptance_criteria":"Each hop can identify and verify the immediate signer independently of preserved IPv6 origin; C/Python/Rust/spec/vectors agree; spoofing, key substitution, and multi-hop forwarding tests fail closed.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-18T21:14:53.372409Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T21:14:53.372409Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.9.8","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-18T21:14:53.498469Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.9.8","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.35","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-18T21:14:53.613289Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
